---
title: "Owen Godwin"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="profile-header">
  <img src="https://schf-org.github.io/schf/people/godwin-owen/avatar.png"
       alt="Owen Godwin" class="profile-avatar">
  <div class="profile-meta">
    <h1>Owen Godwin</h1>
    <p class="profile-title">Musician</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

Ph.D. Chemistry · University of Washington

<!-- Add bio here -->
